expectedDifferences.reason: Shopify returns opaque connection cursors; local serializers use deterministic synthetic cursors that clients must not decode.
Shopify returns opaque connection cursors; local serializers use deterministic synthetic cursors that clients must not decode.

notes: HAR-416 live Shopify evidence captured after deploying released validation and cart-transform Function extensions in the repo-local conformance app. The executable parity request seeds the captured ShopifyFunction metadata and verifies shopifyFunction/shopifyFunctions preserve appKey and selected app fields without executing Function WASM, checkout cart transforms, validation logic, or tax callbacks. Mutation userError probes are recorded in the fixture as access/authority blockers because the current stored OAuth grant cannot be regranted unattended into write_validations/write_cart_transforms/write_taxes.
